---
title: "Pro-trade Blocs in the US Congress"
author: "ByungKoo Kim and Iain Osgood"
date: "2020-01-01"
year: 2020
venue: "The Forum: A Journal of Applied Research in Contemporary Politics, 17, 549--575 (invited contribution)"
url: "https://www.degruyter.com/document/doi/10.1515/for-2019-0035/html"
---
